केचन
kecan

केचन न समर्थाः
kecana na samarthāḥ
Some are not efficient
केचन जनाः स्वार्थिनः
kecana janāḥ svārthinaḥ
Some people are selfish

करोति
do

sentence_eng_meaning
रोदनं करोति
rodanaṃ karoti
cry
निश्चयं करोति
niścayaṃ karoti
decide
t

तावन्त
so much
sanskrit_sentence
sentence_eng_transliteration

एतस्मिन् स्तरे तावन्तः वर्गाः न सन्ति|
--
There are not that many classrooms in that floor.

Highly recommended books on Philosophy read by me!
